title: Melbourne Open Playground
tagline: A full stack Next.js platform built with scalable APIs, authentication, and structured data workflows.
cardDescription: A modern full stack platform using Next.js and Supabase with authentication, RBAC, and data-driven features.
about: Melbourne Open Playground is a collaborative full stack platform focused on presenting structured data through a clean and user-friendly experience.
As Backend and Technical Lead, I contributed to architecture, API design, authentication, role-based access control, and frontend/backend integration.

video.title: Platform Demo
video.description: Walkthrough of platform features and backend-driven workflows.

contributions.title: Technical Leadership
contributions.description: Led backend planning and guided architecture decisions for scalable full stack delivery.

contributions.title: Authentication & RBAC
contributions.description: Implemented secure authentication and role-based access control for different user types.

contributions.title: API & Data Design
contributions.description: Designed backend APIs and structured data models using Supabase and PostgreSQL.

title: MedTrack
tagline: A cloud-native full stack application built with React, Node.js, MongoDB, Docker, and Kubernetes.
cardDescription: A full stack academic project demonstrating modern deployment practices using Docker and Kubernetes.
about: MedTrack was developed as a full stack application using React on the frontend and Node.js on the backend.
The project focused on containerisation and cloud-native deployment, using MongoDB for data storage and Kubernetes for orchestration.

video.title: Cloud Deployment Demo
video.description: Overview of application structure, containerisation, and deployment workflow.

contributions.title: Full Stack Development
contributions.description: Built frontend and backend application layers using React, Node.js, and MongoDB.

contributions.title: Containerisation
contributions.description: Containerised application components using Docker for consistent deployment.

contributions.title: Kubernetes Deployment
contributions.description: Deployed and managed the application using Kubernetes on Google Kubernetes Engine.

title: Logos Pneuma Institute
tagline: A Laravel-based LMS and CMS platform for managing students, lecturers, courses, assignments, and timed quizzes.
cardDescription: A complex Laravel platform combining public content management with internal learning management workflows.
about: Logos Pneuma Institute is a full stack Laravel-based education platform combining a public-facing CMS with a Learning Management System.
The platform supports admins, lecturers, and students with course management, assignments, time-limited quizzes, results, file uploads, and email notifications.

video.title: LMS Overview
video.description: Walkthrough of LMS workflows including roles, courses, quizzes, and assignments.

contributions.title: LMS Architecture
contributions.description: Designed and developed the full LMS structure for students, lecturers, and administrators.

contributions.title: Timed Quiz System
contributions.description: Implemented time-limited quizzes, submissions, and result tracking workflows.

contributions.title: Database Recovery
contributions.description: Rebuilt and stabilised the database structure using migrations and seeders after data loss.

title: DTS Group
tagline: A Laravel-based custom CMS platform designed for flexible content management and professional service presentation.
cardDescription: A custom Laravel CMS enabling non-technical users to manage website content independently.
about: DTS Group required a custom CMS solution to manage website content without relying on a third-party CMS platform.
The project focused on building a scalable Laravel-based backend with a clean content management workflow and user-friendly admin experience.

video.title: CMS Demo
video.description: Overview of custom CMS features and content management workflows.

contributions.title: Custom CMS Development
contributions.description: Built a Laravel-based content management system tailored to client requirements.

contributions.title: Admin Workflows
contributions.description: Developed admin features that allow content updates without technical knowledge.

contributions.title: Frontend Implementation
contributions.description: Implemented responsive frontend layouts aligned with the provided design.

title: Honan Insurance
tagline: A custom WordPress website with guided user input workflows for insurance policy generation.
cardDescription: A full website build involving custom WordPress development, UX design, and dynamic policy generation workflows.
about: Honan Insurance was a custom WordPress-based website developed end-to-end for an Australian client.
The project included UX-focused workflows that allowed users to input information and generate insurance policy-related outputs dynamically.

video.title: Website Walkthrough
video.description: Overview of user workflows, content structure, and responsive experience.

contributions.title: End-to-End Build
contributions.description: Developed the website from implementation through to final delivery.

contributions.title: Dynamic Policy Workflow
contributions.description: Built guided input flows to support policy generation based on user-provided information.

contributions.title: UX & Frontend Design
contributions.description: Created responsive layouts and user-friendly flows to simplify complex interactions.

title: Bonne Maman
tagline: A Shopify eCommerce experience combining product browsing, purchasing, and recipe-driven content engagement.
cardDescription: A Shopify storefront supporting online purchases and recipe-based content for improved customer engagement.
about: Bonne Maman is a Shopify-based eCommerce project focused on presenting products and supporting online purchases.
The website also included a recipe-style blog section to connect products with food ideas and improve engagement.

video.title: Storefront Overview
video.description: Walkthrough of product pages, recipe content, and eCommerce user journey.

contributions.title: Shopify Customisation
contributions.description: Worked on theme customisation and storefront improvements using Shopify and Liquid.

contributions.title: Recipe Content Section
contributions.description: Developed recipe/blog sections to support product-focused content engagement.

contributions.title: Responsive Experience
contributions.description: Improved frontend responsiveness and usability across desktop and mobile devices.

title: Lonsdale Institute
tagline: An education platform supporting course management, online registration, and learning workflows.
cardDescription: An education-focused platform enabling course listings, registration workflows, and online learning support.
about: Lonsdale Institute was developed as an education-focused platform where the client could manage and publish courses.
The platform supported online course registration, Telegram gateway integration, and online learning-style content workflows.

video.title: Education Website Demo
video.description: Overview of course listings, registration flow, and content management.

contributions.title: Course Management
contributions.description: Implemented course-related content structures so the client could add and manage courses.

contributions.title: Online Registration
contributions.description: Built registration workflows with Telegram gateway integration.

contributions.title: Learning Content Support
contributions.description: Supported online learning-style content presentation and course discovery.

title: Dual Flow Plumbing
tagline: A clean Webflow business website designed to present plumbing services clearly and professionally.
cardDescription: A responsive Webflow website focused on service presentation, brand trust, and simple user navigation.
about: Dual Flow Plumbing was an informative business website built using Webflow to present services clearly and professionally.
The project focused on responsive design, clean content structure, and an easy-to-navigate experience for potential customers.

video.title: Website Overview
video.description: Overview of service sections, responsive layout, and business presentation.

contributions.title: Webflow Development
contributions.description: Built the website using Webflow with clean layouts and manageable structure.

contributions.title: Responsive Layout
